fixed_source: m=conv;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=convert(val:$f64;from:$str;to:$str):$f64{let fromval=mut.val;if(from="kPa"){fromval=val*1000.0;}el{if(from="bar"){fromval=val*100000.0;}el{if(from="atm"){fromval=val*101325.0;}el{if(from="psi"){fromval=val*6894.76;}el{if(from="mmHg"){fromval=val*133.322;};};};};};};let result=mut.0.0;if(to="Pa"){result=fromval;}el{if(to="kPa"){result=fromval/1000.0;}el{if(to="bar"){result=fromval/100000.0;}el{if(to="atm"){result=fromval/101325.0;}el{if(to="psi"){result=fromval/6894.76;}el{if(to="mmHg"){result=fromval/133.322;}el{result=fromval;};};};};};};< result;};f=main():$i64{let line=io.readln();let parts=s.split(line;" ");if(parts.len()>=3){let val=s.tofloat(parts.get(0));let from=parts.get(1);let to=parts.get(2);let result=convert(val;from;to);io.println(s.fromfloat(result));};<0;}
